product.name: XTimer
product.description: Control a fullscreen timer remotely for presentations, workshops, livestreams, and events.
product.long_description: XTimer is a web-based countdown and stage timer for presentations, workshops, livestreams, meetings, and live events. Event producers can run a fullscreen timer on one or more displays and control it remotely from another device, keeping speakers, moderators, and audiences in sync. It supports countdown, count-up, clock, and run-of-show workflows, plus shareable agenda links, moderator links, audience question links, wrap-up cues, and responsive fullscreen display modes. Free users can start with core timer rooms, while Pro and Premium plans add production-grade features such as API control, custom branding, password-protected links, chimes and alerts, overtime behavior, custom themes, backgrounds, fonts, and colors.
features: Shareable agenda and audience question links
Wrap-up color changes, sounds, and chimes
API and custom branding on paid plans
